author: altdlt
title: Fantastic!
content: I give this 5 star coz this app helps me a lot it’s like a mp3tag that iven using but this one is more useable specially like me is using more tags in my mp3 and music player if you like your music has a background or tags in the music this app is for you it’s very easy to use and  very friendly I will recommend this for you guys out there best platform for tagging a music background you guys save my day more power to your team devs keep it I hope in the future you will put some you know stuff like you can put a lyrics and it will appear in the music player hope so again the best app for tagging music NIce job Devs.😊
